aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to insufficient conversational content and missing authority signals, despite having a strong local presence.
quick_wins: Add FAQ content with structured answers to common HVAC queries.
Implement HowTo schema for maintenance and repair guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer Q&A on the profile.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for maintenance or repair guides
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best HVAC repair in Granada Hills' or 'how to maintain HVAC systems'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating an FAQ section with detailed answers to common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads as AI models overlook your services.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ content and structured data, causing AI models to skip citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies including FAQ content, HowTo schema, and authority signals to align with AI query patterns.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Leads: Close the AI Visibility Gap Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your site for AI-driven queries and capture more leads.
